steps.command: echo 'Checking environment...' && which jq && which bash

steps.instruction: Read the environment check output from the previous step. Create a short summary file at reports/env-report.md listing the detected tool versions and paths.

steps.command: test -f reports/env-report.md && grep -q . reports/env-report.md && echo 'SUCCESS' || echo 'FAILURE'

steps.instruction: The workflow completed successfully. Write a short explanation to reports/workflow-result.md explaining that the workflow succeeded — include which steps passed and why (reference the outputs in .wheel/outputs/).

The workflow failed. Write a short explanation to reports/workflow-result.md explaining why the workflow failed — examine the step outputs in .wheel/outputs/ and .wheel/state.json to identify which step failed and what went wrong.
